eligibility: Open to boys and girls in grades 3–8 living in Pleasanton or Sunol. No prior experience needed — players of all skill levels are welcome!

details.label: Key Dates
details.value: Evaluations: mid-September · Practices: October · Games: Late Oct – mid-Feb

details.label: Practice & Games
details.value: 2 practices/week · Games on Sunday afternoons throughout the Tri-Valley area

details.label: Locations
details.value: St. Elizabeth's Gym + Pleasanton middle school gyms · Pleasanton, Danville, Dublin, San Ramon, Livermore

details.label: Open to All
details.value: All faiths and beliefs welcome — no Catholic affiliation required

details.label: What's Included
details.value: Jersey, shorts, and socks provided · Bring your own basketball shoes
